Live Demo · no sign-up needed

Try Praxmate for yourself.

Two sides, one booking. On the left, see how patients book an appointment online. On the right, see how the practice receives and manages that exact appointment in real time.

Patient view
🙋

How patients book

Just open the link, pick a treatment and a free slot, enter contact details — done.

  • Real booking UI of the demo practice
  • Bookings land in the demo calendar (not a real practice)
  • No confirmation email — this is just a demo
  • Mobile-optimized, GDPR-compliant
Open as patient →
Tip: book an appointment here, then open the admin view on the right — the new booking will show up in the calendar instantly.
Practice view
🩺

How the practice manages

Dashboard, calendar, patient management, settings. Click in — no login required, we'll sign you in automatically.

  • 2 practitioners, 4 treatment types, 10 demo patients
  • ~60 sample appointments (past & future)
  • Full access: appointments, patients, settings
  • Everything is demo data — you can't break anything
Or sign in yourself: email demo@praxmate.de · password DemoPraxmate2026

Frequently asked questions

Is this real patient data?

No. The demo practice "Praxmate Demo Clinic" is entirely fictional — doctors, patients, and appointments are made up.

Can I break something?

No. The demo is isolated from all real customers. If the demo gets messy over time, we simply reset it.

Do patients who book on the demo actually receive emails?

No — outgoing email is disabled in the demo. You can safely make test bookings with any address.

Can I get a demo for my own practice?

Yes — we'll happily set up a personalized demo with your logo and treatment types. Email h.guencavdi@hasi-elektronic.de.
